title: The Bronze Age
description: Adds two new ores to Minecraft that make the early game more complex and difficult.
body:
**The Bronze Age**

The Bronze Age brings new challenges to early game survival, slowing the player down whilst also offering early game progression and protection.

Stone tools will no longer suffice to cut through Iron. You'll need stronger tools for that.

New to the world is Tin, a common ore that is found in higher elevations. When smelted and crafted with Copper Ingots, you'll enter the Bronze Age. 
Craft spartan inspired armor sets, a full new set of tools and brand new craftable horse armor that provides your horse with style and offer better protection.

In terms of progression, Bronze sits between Stone/Iron for tools and Chainmail/Iron for armor.

If you have suggestions or find any bugs, please let me know in my Discord server.

**DISCLAIMER: THIS MOD IS DESIGNED/INTENDED FOR USE WITH THE EXCALIBUR RESOURCE PACK. I DO NOT OWN ANY TEXTURES ASSOCIATED WITH THE EXALCIBUR RESOURCE PACK.**
